itinerary.mapNote: Aerial Tramway bypass to valley floor, then climb to stunning Marion Lake. 2747m.

itinerary.route: Marion Lake to Death Canyon Shelf
itinerary.mapNote: Dramatic shelf camp with sweeping Teton views. Exposed camping. 2865m.

itinerary.route: Death Canyon Shelf to Alaska Basin
itinerary.mapNote: Wildflower meadows and the extraordinary Alaska Basin basin camps. 3008m.

itinerary.route: Alaska Basin to South Fork Cascade
itinerary.mapNote: Cross Hurricane Pass with Grand Teton's full north face revealed. 2987m.

itinerary.route: South Fork to Leigh Lake Trailhead
itinerary.mapNote: Final descent through ancient moraines to the valley floor. 2073m.

waypoints.name: Hurricane Pass
waypoints.note: Highest point on the trail. Grand Teton's north face fills the sky.

waypoints.name: Grand Teton
waypoints.note: Highest peak in the Teton Range. Dominates every viewpoint on the trail.

waypoints.name: Alaska Basin
waypoints.note: Wildflower paradise — best alpine meadows in Wyoming.

waypoints.name: Death Canyon Shelf
waypoints.note: Dramatic shelf with 50km views across the range.
